subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call and have remembered thee. Verily, thy Lord is the All-Remembering, the All-Knowing. Hold thou fast unto the cord of thy Lord's loving-kindness and say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و ذکرناک ان ربک لهو الذاکر العلیم تمسک بعروه عنایه ربک و قل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
